script.openingLine: Welcome to Replay, where Mexico’s meeting with Ecuador comes back to life.

moments.spokenLine: Mexico meet Ecuador in the round of 32 at Mexico City Stadium.
moments.explainer: The replay begins with the setting established: a knockout meeting between Mexico and Ecuador.
Mexico take the lead, creating the first verified shift in the score.

moments.spokenLine: Raul JIMENEZ makes it 2–0 to Mexico.
moments.explainer: Mexico double their advantage, moving from a narrow lead to a two-goal margin.

moments.spokenLine: Alan FRANCO is shown a card for Ecuador.
moments.explainer: The first verified disciplinary moment arrives before the interval, with Ecuador receiving the card.

moments.spokenLine: Mexico lead Ecuador 2–0 at the interval.
moments.explainer: Half-time confirms Mexico’s two-goal advantage after the opening period.

moments.spokenLine: Kendry PAEZ is shown a card for Ecuador.
moments.explainer: A late card adds another disciplinary moment for Ecuador.

moments.spokenLine: Piero HINCAPIE is shown a red card for Ecuador.
moments.explainer: The red card is a decisive late match event, arriving while Mexico hold a 2–0 lead.

moments.spokenLine: Moises CAICEDO is shown a card for Ecuador.
moments.explainer: Another Ecuador card follows in the closing moments of the match.

moments.spokenLine: Mexico 2–0 Ecuador. That is the final score.
moments.explainer: The full-time score confirms Mexico’s two-goal victory over Ecuador.

chapters.text: At kick-off, Mexico meet Ecuador in the round of 32 at Mexico City Stadium.
In the 22nd minute, Julian QUINONES puts Mexico ahead, 1–0.
In the 31st minute, Raul JIMENEZ makes it 2–0 to Mexico.
In the 1st minute of first-half stoppage time, Alan FRANCO is shown a card for Ecuador.
In the 3rd minute of second-half stoppage time, Kendry PAEZ is shown a card for Ecuador.
In the 5th minute of second-half stoppage time, Piero HINCAPIE is shown a red card for Ecuador.
In the 9th minute of second-half stoppage time, Moises CAICEDO is shown a card for Ecuador.
At full-time, Mexico 2–0 Ecuador. That is the final score.
